The entire plan is set in Vienna. Accommodation is Hotel Pension Walzerstadt at Zieglergasse 35, 1070 Vienna. All activities are located in Vienna.
Outbound train is scheduled for 2026-07-10, return train for 2026-07-14. The plan covers 5 days (July 10–14), matching the requested date range.

Accommodation is priced at €96/night × 4 nights = €384, suitable for 2 adults. Transport tickets are priced at 2× €25.20 = €50.40. Museum tickets show €44 total (= €22 per adult). All pricing reflects 2 adults.
Total estimated cost is €1198.40, which is below the €1200 budget. Sum confirmed: €584.40 + €241 + €152 + €125 + €96 = €1198.40.
Hotel Pension Walzerstadt is confirmed as accommodation (verified as a budget hotel/pension at Zieglergasse 35, 1070 Vienna with Wi-Fi). A pension qualifies as a hotel category.

Activities reflect all three interests: Museums (Kunsthistorisches Museum, Upper Belvedere, Wien Museum), Food (Café Sperl, Figlmüller, Plachutta, Griechenbeisl, etc.), City Walks (Innere Stadt walk, Hofburg walk, Stadtpark, Belvedere Gardens, MuseumsQuartier).

Two critical venues are verified as FAIL: (1) Day 2 slot 3 - Kunsthistorisches Museum claims 'daily 10:00–18:00 in July' but official source confirms hours are 'Tue-Sun, 10 a.m. - 6 p.m.' (closed Mondays); (2) Day 3 slot 3 - Meierei im Stadtpark is scheduled for Sunday, July 12, 2026, but official source confirms the venue is 'closed on Sundays'. Additionally, Day 2 slot 1 misrepresents Café Sperl's closure day (claims Sunday closure but actual closure is Saturday in July/August).

All transit slots specify reasonable transfer times (e.g., 30-45 minute transfers). Wien Hbf to hotel is 11:30-12:15 (45 min), hotel to museums 20-30 min, transfer to Upper Belvedere 30 min. These are realistic for Vienna's public transport.
Meal times are appropriately spaced: breakfast 08:30-09:30, lunch 11:00-14:30, dinner 18:30-20:45. No unrealistic gaps or overlaps between meal slots.
Check-in on Day 1 at 12:15 is reasonable. Checkout on Day 5 at 08:30 is standard for early departure trains.
Budget is allocated reasonably: accommodation 32% (€384), transport 13% (€162.40), meals 42% (€501), attractions 13% (€84). Within €1200 total.

The plan is physically feasible within 5 days. Walking routes (Innere Stadt 14:15-17:00, Hofburg walk 14:30-16:30) are reasonable. Public transport connections are specified for all major venues. No impossibly tight schedules.
